mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, command_id, batch_id, command_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, kafka_topic, kafka_key, protocol_account_id, payload_json, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, locked_by, locked_at, sent_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO protocol_command_outbox ( command_id, batch_id, command_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, kafka_topic, kafka_key, protocol_account_id, payload_json, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{r.commandId}, #{r.batchId}, #{r.commandType}, #{r.aggregateType}, #{r.aggregateId}, #{r.kafkaTopic}, #{r.kafkaKey}, #{r.protocolAccountId}, #{r.payloadJson}, #{r.status}, #{r.retryCount}, #{r.nextRetryAt}, #{r.createdAt}, #{r.updatedAt} )
